sentences.title: Plan first
sentences.text: Do not start writing code yet. First restate your understanding, ask clarifying questions, and propose a concrete plan.

sentences.title: Fully understand first
sentences.text: Make sure you fully understand the contents and constraints before acting. Ask as many clarifying questions as needed so we are on the same page.

sentences.title: No code yet
sentences.text: Do not write code, create files, or modify anything yet. Stay in analysis and planning mode until I explicitly say to implement.

sentences.title: Verify before final
sentences.text: Before saying the work is complete, run the relevant verification commands and report exactly what passed or what could not be run.

sentences.title: Review with focus
sentences.text: Review {file} carefully. Focus on {concern}. Lead with concrete bugs or risks and include file and line references where possible.

sentences.title: Explain simply
sentences.text: Explain this in simple, direct language. Keep the answer practical and avoid unnecessary theory.

sentences.title: Chinese human tone
sentences.text: 用中文回答，口吻自然一点，不要像模板，也不要太书面。先讲结论，再讲关键原因。

sentences.title: Debug systematically
sentences.text: Debug this systematically. First reproduce or inspect the failure, then identify the smallest likely cause, then make a focused fix and verify it.
